```{=html}
<!-- case_when() - with unmatched row -->
<script>
window.CWU_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.CWU_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition: [cond1, cond2]
// Condition 1: body_mass_g > 4500 (row 3 only)
// Condition 2: body_mass_g < 3800 (row 0 only)
// Row 1 and 2 are unmatched (3800 and 4500 don't match either condition)
window.CWU_MATCHES = [
  [false, false, false, true],   // > 4500
  [true, false, false, false]    // < 3800
];
window.CWU_LABELS = ['Large', 'Small'];
window.CWU_COND_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5'];
</script>
```

::: {.cwu-stage-wrap}
<div id="cwu-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .cwu-frag id="cwu-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .cwu-frag id="cwu-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .cwu-frag id="cwu-result"}
[]{.fragment .cwu-frag id="cwu-highlight-na"}
